fields"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Ranking"}],": BM25-based relevance scoring"]}],"\n"]}],"\n",["$","h2",null,{"children":"Query Syntax"}],"\n",["$","$L7",null,{"code":"# Simple term\nresults = mem.text_search(\"database\")\n\n# Phrase (exact sequence)\nresults = mem.text_search('\"machine learning\"')\n\n# Boolean\nresults = mem.text_search(\"deployment AND kubernetes\")\nresults = mem.text_search(\"python OR golang\")\nresults = mem.text_search(\"database NOT mongodb\")\n\n# Prefix\nresults = mem.text_search(\"auth*\")\n\n# Column filter\nresults = mem.text_search(\"tags:production database\")\n","language":"python"}],"\n",["$","h2",null,{"children":"BM25 9:["$","p",null,{"children":"Where:"}]
a:["$","ul",null,{"children":["\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","code",null,{"children":"N"}],": Total documents"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","code",null,{"children":"df"}],": Documents containing term"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","code",null,{"children":"f"}],": Term frequency in document"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","code",null,{"children":"dl"}],": Document length"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","code",null,{"children":"avgdl"}],": Average document length"]}],"\n"]}]
